Escala Secures $4.5M in Funding to Accelerate Global Expansion of Its FDA-Approved Medical Device Escala Medical Ltd. ("Escala"), a medical technology company specializing in innovative repair solutions for women with Pelvic Organ Prolapse (POP), today announced the successful completion of a $4.5 million funding round. The investment included the EIC Fund, following a €2.5 million grant awarded to Escala in October 2023 through the prestigious EIC Accelerator program. The round also included participation from private investors in the United States and Israel.
